name: marketing-skills
description: A comprehensive collection of 25+ marketing skills and tactics for conversion-focused marketers. Includes expert guidance on copywriting, cold email outreach, marketing psychology (70+ mental models), pricing strategy, SEO audits, content strategy, social media content, email sequences, CRO (conversion rate optimization), A/B testing, analytics tracking, paid advertising, sales enablement, and more. Each skill provides structured frameworks, best practices, templates, and actionable checklists to help marketers create high-converting campaigns and optimize every stage of the customer journey.
